Friend,

I was just going through our fundraising reports for May and I saw that your name wasn’t on the list of end of month online donors.

**That’s totally fine — I understand. Our economy is suffering and I know that times are tough for folks all across our state and region. If you can’t give right now, then please don’t.**

But in case our emails got lost in the shuffle of your inbox, I wanted to reach out and give you one last chance to make a significant impact.

The month is over, but we still have a long way until Election Day 2020 and I’ll need your support to help end Nancy Pelosi’s incompetent regime and turn the House red.

Friend, you can still make an impact on my 2020 election by chipping in name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: ✋ STOP WHAT YOU'RE DOING
body:
Have you voted yet today? There's only two hours left for you to cast your ballot in this critical election to the future of our state and nation.

Hello

Have you made your voice heard yet in this election? Only two hours remain until polls close.

Make sure you're one of the tens of thousands of Iowans choosing our district's next congressman.

Polls are open today until 9 PM and remember to bring along an ID. You can locate your county's merged polling places here: sos.iowa.gov/elections/voterreg/pollingplace/details.aspx (http://sos.iowa.gov/elections/voterreg/pollingplace/details.aspx?fbclid=IwAR0RDJ5wMk7YE0Q9TLv-YO17iBBfxa0znQ6tH-Uppgs3pfNvuLAxdsQNe7M&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=e72b294980-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-e72b294980-25822489) .

If you still have an absentee ballot and have not sent it in yet, you can 1) turn it in by 9 PM tonight to your county auditor or 2) go to the polls and exchange it for an in-person ballot. For more information, go to voterready.iowa.gov.
(https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fvoterready.iowa.gov%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR0bIs3MirwkbKhtKPcQFmDyHc8oa_U707dIlV3l9q0fXtZRSeqGgmhE5u4&h=AT0iCA44i2vbR0ALKmafL2X1hJ1Y60bdKecxrasl5RCVxW5-mR2f5VAV9pt8Pzzgb0-zthi9kfnND8aHDd2or6ZQIzBbGtpd7urDl4j9jbXvHiDsJUlu6jGJn0raUEnGc1zD6Zal74NmyKKV-MBD4Of1EJeEGLsOK7s8cO3khiB07QYYGdEjCum7J2p3B1jpaQNVHlUCvdNYtQlqVOwpVC2pl36kiA0S-B-p_HEN3bKIyPgVWSQ4mlQGQmChyuyeXuqKM7wworW0VDZApl3D-CbZVLJF4SrYHpCzDG66Ocb8pPFkBb6NhSYZnm78ygYaykNlPGpN2i-vpLVgBabpDywJkq9ZSIxhGjwuacItaO8UzJCqdMogRVaa2UKB2G_1O7C0g1sL552SjboeYbkx1ZWgLcGrncNeZ2d1WSUeHaiu8vD9477zf7s9S7CY4eZ0rPsoKYow9CNI8yKGhDEPuND9_Iw0ExrmrDepxr8RwjJ4psW2lyMIgRvp29XIjLNg2W279VFXiUjBQFCccNkvBRmHrm_L5zKn_hR2JWh2itxVh5APGZRMk_ekhLCocKrh6Z-x4_BfqiuqOF4mwWWM3JQyruJHxUK_8U9Kmsy63l8xfp1l1cecO3KztQ8lz8qn8VHY6Jj2LdVKrol4Yk7RK-I5&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=e72b294980-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-e72b294980-25822489) Whichever way you choose, make sure to vote!

I
was working hard today knocking doors in Denison and Harlan (https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress/videos/545673179447258/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=e72b294980-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-e72b294980-25822489) to drive out last minute voters. Tell your brother, your cousin, and anyone you know that hasn't voted to make it to the polls.

Let's win this,

Bret Richards
(712) 579-4753

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Where is the media outrage on these deaths and shootings?
body:
Four days ago, another African-American man was killed, this time gunned down while standing outside the... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ddd47a68ef&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 2, 2020
---
| | |
# **Where is the media outrage on these deaths and shootings?**

**All Americans** were rightly sickened by the brutal death of George Floyd in Minneapolis last week, President Trump says. “My administration is fully committed that, for George and his family, justice will be served. He will not have died in vain.”

**Four days ago** , another African-American man was killed, this time gunned down while standing outside the Ronald V. Dellums Federal Building and U.S. Courthouse in Oakland, California.

**Dave Patrick Underwood** isn’t a household name. His death didn’t make nearly as many headlines. But his life mattered, too, and his murder should sicken every American.

**Underwood was** a law enforcement officer in the Federal Protective Service. He and a colleague were standing guard when the gunshots came, killing Underwood and sending his fellow officer to the hospital in critical condition. Oakland’s interim police chief says the shooting was most likely an attack that deliberately targeted uniformed officers.

**All across America** , violent domestic terrorists have exploited the real hurt and pain felt by thousands of peaceful protesters. The need to save innocent lives and protect our most vulnerable communities from these criminals should be obvious to every peace-loving citizen. Yet media talking heads and opportunistic politicians would rather keep exploiting fear instead of solving the problem and restoring order. That’s unacceptable.

**“If a city or a state** refuses to take the actions that are necessary to defend the life and property of their residents, then I will deploy the United States military and quickly solve the problem for them,” President Trump said in an address last night.

**Ending domestic terrorism** shouldn’t be a partisan issue that Democrats leave to Republicans. Neither should loudly supporting the thousands of decent, brave law enforcement officers who put themselves on the line every night to keep us safe.

**Violence against police** officers is an affront to everything America stands for. Stories about the assaults against them over the past week need to be told, even if corporate media executives decide that it isn’t the “right” narrative to push:
* [**A Las Vegas officer is on life support**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9c76730e91&e=3ee4985eea) after a gunshot to the head.

* [**Four police officers were shot**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e76d2353e&e=3ee4985eea) last night during riots in St. Louis.

* [**An NYPD officer was struck by a vehicle**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=30b77e081a&e=3ee4985eea) in an apparent hit-and-run.

* [**Violent thugs beat**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6ed0c2daf0&e=3ee4985eea) a police officer on the streets of New York.

**How does any of this help** our nation heal from the tragedy in Minnesota?

**It doesn’t.** No American, from any community, should ever feel unsafe on our streets—and that includes those who risk their lives to protect us. The rule of law applies to everyone, from bad cops who abuse their power to violent rioters who attack the police.

**President Trump** wants justice for all, with no exceptions. The actions he announced last night will bring order to our streets and get us closer to making sure that happens.

[_Vox_ chooses to lie about the President instead of shining a light on violence.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c00f500953&e=3ee4985eea)

**WATCH** : [President Trump’s address to the country last night](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c2b63f52d&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump and the First Lady visit the Saint John Paul II National Shrine** | June 2, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33fba4b29f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=16d3212efe&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=42333f064f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Shares Hagerty Statements on Antifa, Veterans For Hagerty
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-tr/) June 2, 2020 [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-r/) **ICYMI: Bill's Statements On ANTIFA** With the recent riots around the country, including Tennessee, Bill Hagerty issued a **[statement](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-y/)** on Saturday night calling for the end of violence and looting by Antifa. Yesterday, Bill issued another statement calling President Trump to use the Insurrection Act to mobilize active-duty military forces in order to defend our communities from further acts of domestic terrorism, and the President listened! Antifa is a hate group that commits violent acts of domestic terrorism. And it's past time for it to be designated as such. Read Bill's full statement **[H](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-j/)****[E](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-t/)[ RE](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-i/)****[.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-d/)** **Veterans For Hagerty** Last week, Team Hagerty released a coalition that includes over 1,200 Tennessee veterans from all branches of our distinguished military. Following the release of **[Bill's Blueprint To Support Our Veterans](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-h/) , **the Veterans for Hagerty coalition has released [**videos**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-k/) sharing their support of Bill. Deputy Speaker Curtis Johnson, a member of the coalition, even published an editorial in the [**Leaf Chronicle**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-u/) stating, "I am proud to join many other veterans across Tennessee in supporting Bill Hagerty for the United States Senate because he will stand alongside President Trump to support our veterans and make sure they have access to quality health care and job opportunities."Freedom is not free, and we must always take care of those who have risked so much to protect our American way of life. As your next Senator, Bill will continue to work alongside President Trump to ensure our veterans are equipped with the tools they need to transition successfully into civilian life. Find out more about Veterans For Hagerty **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-m/)** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-c/) **WATCH: Tele-Townhall With Lara Trump** We are so proud to have another member of the Trump family on Team Hagerty. Last week, Lara Trump became the second member of the Trump family to hold an event in support of Hagerty's campaign for Senate. Lara gave Team Hagerty an update on the President's campaign and discussed the need to retain a Republican majority in the U.S. Senate. Listen to the full tele-townhall **[HERE](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-q/)**[.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-a/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-f/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-z/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-v/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Chattanoogan:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-e/)**[****](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-s/) Bill Hagerty Calls On President Trump To Use The Insurrection Act To Use Military**[TNJ:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-g/) **On the Hill: Hagerty calls on president to invoke Insurrection Act, mobilize active-duty military**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-w/) **Bill Hagerty Announces Veterans for Hagerty Coalition**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-yd/) **Lara Trump Blasts Mainstream Media, Tells Tennessee Why Donald Trump Must Not Only Win Reelection but Must Win by a Landslide**[Williamson Homepage:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-yh/)** Lara Trump to Tennessee voters: Bill Hagerty will 'help hold communist Chinese regime responsible' for COVID-19 pandemic
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-jl/)_" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revial. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-jr/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-jy/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-jj/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-jt/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-ji/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-jd/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-jh/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-jk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pyhlihd-fuutjhhtj-tl/)

After Hutch's campaign commercial hit the airwaves around the state last week, he and the campaign received multiple messages wanting to know if the antique firearm was real or just a commercial prop. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17733287/204542774/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTU3Nzg1Mi1iOWE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqpxCRomAmCL6jHz2aFPoKiRsIBHFMkTO6gZsNczdYA=&emci=c32c18d1-d4a4-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=ce577852-b9a5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) Friend,

Our communities are demanding change.

And for years, families in Southwest Florida have had a representative who has consistently chosen to ignore the will of those who elected him in order to fall in line with GOP extremists, leaving so many Florida families behind.

I’ve always believed this campaign is only as strong as the base of grassroots supporters that’s behind it. So thank you again for being a part of the people-power that ensures we can overcome whatever challenges we face.

And to those that gave before our last fundraising deadline, I’m grateful for your investment in changing the leadership in Florida’s 16th District.

Together, we can create real change for our Suncoast communities.

Thank you,

Margaret

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: ENOUGH
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
It’s been heartbreaking to see the destruction that has taken place in our city and in cities across the nation this week. The riots, the arson of police vehicles, the vandalism of church property, the destruction and looting of small businesses owned by innocent, hardworking people - this is anarchy and chaos, NOT protest. And NONE OF IT achieves the justice George Floyd deserves.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=167A231A1A3024)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

It’s been heartbreaking to see the destruction that has taken place in our city and in cities across the nation this week. The riots, the arson of police vehicles, the vandalism of church property, the destruction and looting of small businesses owned by innocent, hardworking people - this is anarchy and chaos, NOT protest. And NONE OF IT achieves the justice George Floyd deserves.

This is the result of dangerous policies put in place by radical politicians who have sent the message that there are no consequences for crime.

Liberals, including Max Rose, have put us all in danger by voting for or supporting policies like:
❌ Closing Rikers Island
❌ Releasing of convicted felons
❌ Eliminating bail for rioting, arson, robbery and assault

It is absolutely unacceptable for politicians like Max Rose to protect criminals instead of protecting our communities.
---
| | |
---
| | [ HELP DEFEAT MAX ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=167A231A1A3025)
---
| | |
---
| | And with some New York politicians defending this anarchy and calling to defund our police, someone had to speak up so [I went on Fox News this morning to fight back!](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=167A231A1A3023)

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=167A231A1A3023)
---
| | |
---
| | Pandering to far left radicals and criminals must STOP. We need elected leaders who support law and order with their words, actions and votes!

[Please stay safe during these uncertain times, and fight back by donating today and voting in November!](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=167A231A1A3025)

---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | [ DONATE NOW ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=167A231A1A3025)
---
| | | [ VOLUNTEER ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=167A231A1A3037)
---
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| | Sincerely,

---
| |
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis

name: MJ Hegar News Alert
subject: These Women Can Flip The Senate 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Hint: MJ is one of them.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890009/7f51f7bc/4e3e3364/4ef69dff/3728930187/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890009/7f51f7bc/4e3e3364/4ef69dfe/3728930187/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0OTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200603.1nd__1491__&amount=10")
---
There's no question that flipping the Senate is going to take a lot of hard work, Peter. As a working mom and veteran combat search and rescue pilot, **MJ knows _a lot_ about hard work -- and she's fighting hard to flip Texas (and the Senate along with it).**

As a mom of two young kids, MJ understands how important it is to protect reproductive rights, ensure that our kids get the education they need, fix our criminal justice system, and give our kids a healthy, habitable planet for the future. She's always thinking about what policies mean not just to us right now, but all of our kids and future generations.

**Pitch in to MJ 's campaign to elect a working mom who understands that the decisions she makes as our senator will have an impact on all of us, all of our kids, and generations to come.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

These deadlines are crucial because the FEC reports allow us to show everyone the strength of our campaign. **_Well, tonight at midnight is the final FEC deadline of the campaign_**.
We have done a great job fundraising, and are proud to say we have raised over a million dollars in this campaign. But we still don’t have all of the resources we need to get our message out. That’s why we still need to raise $9,867 before midnight tonight. **_[Can you make a donation now to help us hit our goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IwE/ni0YAA/t.32b/OGUBF1ZGSCWa5OsZc-Fu9w/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL8mYfCNMDnpDlRRIQmgTePGPyyr0KD0n03OlDLyJ7P1XJJxaXf6brWNly1QGMAm2kzLg0WOpZeMdicMQ7bt8srFpWi1tLs4KyIu-2BRRi1vFMdHDGzUYcjbKE19t6MEgZwRSL3SynoZea0QGOrg6TiJX2lTRvHA3z0e9R29zGehia8wq6JkNk3QOR38KGZnsRcGmzmXMLSNYYCMrufd-2BwELsLppEwiOaGiBEC-2F8Gn8xHW9ev-2FXSox0HlaROvyWivc5YpSlUqLoPca4ZYSZ65-2BcCw6gg8Bg-2BGqkPtwpS6RyRP1kJAKCKaa-2FMh-2FwXMDKmICGU-3D/vS9z)_**
Fundraising isn’t just crucial because of the FEC deadline; we also have a brand new TV ad, titled “Grateful,” that’s airing today. Whether or not we hit our goal determines our ability to air this ad as much as we need to reach every voter in the final 3 weeks. **_[Will you make a contribution to help us get our new ad up on TV?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IwE/ni0YAA/t.32b/OGUBF1ZGSCWa5OsZc-Fu9w/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL8mYfCNMDnpDlRRIQmgTePGPyyr0KD0n03OlDLyJ7P1Z98mtx85vI4xH63xI-2Fdb4g2bmAs9rVaqsyXiBVib-2FLiWqvuljn6eOrBX8gpX5Tf2wJMlNEIH6CotpAMbQHk7WfWwaq0Oy2KeITarbGtyuf0q7eg8WrfSXTUugJpvKbizapNPm3nd99Je0SDhaDL7ycvcbz-2FbmGJPJ1Aw-2BnLjZ8mrYrojovHhPL9stWU-2FX17qhSmiJqKia4mTFRQH4RfCPeYGoBNCtKVaJUivZlxzp3xrjHKPFYzDYhKZjUpXqZNxcxn884xQlxqs2ABp9NRFBc-3D/1qnk)_**
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IwE/ni0YAA/t.32b/OGUBF1ZGSCWa5OsZc-Fu9w/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL8mYfCNMDnpDlRRIQmgTePGPyyr0KD0n03OlDLyJ7P1X9hx9srAJwwBb3EVccDLCT5rGZgnIHvzZlxoSulPufdXDzTMdT-2FMYFB3mwjrkOjEICGEAH-2BoyjUBB-2BgjuryZxc4rAUSR-2FAVQziRV7MucYtHMQGxhr4PcgIZDADziOrKqjcwa-2F9d9zbzgJDY1xRQGHEK0Eo8PPHFIiolBflI-2BxBr5rBjYmhHEunp6SWAQ2bk-2Bgh-2F9KehzEu07a5-2Fk3AUnqvCKe-2FrGHswEospEcUuSqQK4uA1G00pb0sLIrgSrkLvFVwad-2BYgnFfGEI4-2FQak6szI-3D/XP0s)
In our new ad, Mondaire talks about being afraid of getting sick while growing up because his family couldn’t afford to see a doctor. **_That’s why Mondaire is the only candidate in this primary who doesn’t think you should lose your health care if you’ve lost your job_**.

Now more than ever, we need leaders in Congress for whom policy is personal. We need leaders we can count on to fight for racial, economic, social, and environmental justice because they’ve been fighting for it their entire lives and know what it’s like to be discriminated against and to struggle. Mondaire is that type of leader.
In less than three weeks, we can send Mondaire to Congress. But not without your help. **_[Will you stand with us by making a contribution today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IwE/ni0YAA/t.32b/OGUBF1ZGSCWa5OsZc-Fu9w/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL8mYfCNMDnpDlRRIQmgTePGPyyr0KD0n03OlDLyJ7P1WkJiLc7i5DvLvFZbhpXyA6oJ-2B31EgZcwsQGygnyOwMbxiYTD6isgfgwIjJCy-2F1kUi-2Byu4PeB3lGQtXfGEUCEQRomLMgdL50EXAjsNAuj0PvPnO6IAjVpkqmlze772KmfjNA-2Be9LV121LJiqDqBlHm9H-2BbApJqgoxuiD6XYWNF8C9UZ7RO6z38-2Fux88N10yI8HBIGtEZ50tEtM-2FCMEoVAXEYCFh6iyDa50hXEbH800mvdIUt7iCuBklBNq42VovFTGzqCPnc-2FlRx5JMhAPLaohg-3D/U8IN)_**

name: House DFL Team
subject: Permanent, deep, systemic change
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
| | Friend, George Floyd should be alive right now. He was killed by four members of the Minneapolis Police Federation, who disregarded his humanity and snuffed out his life before our eyes, disregarding his repeated pleas that he could not breathe. Yesterday, legislators in the People of Color and Indigenous (POCI) Caucus [highlighted nearly two dozen policy changes](https://act.myngp.com/el/OaxQW4bupjAYz48phK9Asc0jQNeoEGbKOqlCvc3eeQU=/TeCI57JdBTXavleHeVPWaq0F9aNiT2xP_D6Q0UdW_Gg=?fbclid=IwAR35ucLFm4QPsbfG53PLvsGnUwCKUHCAg2yOYgmxuw_SoYuK4yme83rNfTc) to respond to the murder of George Floyd. We are dedicated to advancing these measures to hold police accountable and to reform our criminal justice system. Racial disparities also exist in education, housing, health care, and wealth. We have a lot of work to do to dismantle structural racism and create justice, and we are committed to that work. These proposals are long-overdue and will be a top priority in the upcoming special session. We need to work together to knock down long-standing institutions of structural racism in our society. George Floyd's murder isn't an isolated case. We need permanent, deep, systemic change and we need it now. Thank you, House DFL Team
---
| Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.
---
DFL House Caucus
255 E Plato Blvd
Saint Paul MN 55107 United States
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OaxQW4bupjAYz48phK9Asc0jQNeoEGbKOqlCvc3eeQU=/2HJOPZzHDKdfC1CcN3SkxV0kGKl4a-9rZjPFZ0241XE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OaxQW4bupjAYz48phK9Asc0jQNeoEGbKOqlCvc3eeQU=/Non3M5plZu5JDaHO3y8Cfsg0_kkS9rH3JoBO0NDqkUs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OaxQW4bupjAYz48phK9Asc0jQNeoEGbKOqlCvc3eeQU=/wMLiBrR1YLGBsokXv83tvukRgZIruUXcXU9sm41X1kI=)

name: Claire (personal)
subject: Thank you for everything, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hi Peter \- I wanted to reach out and thank you for your support throughout this campaign. Even though we came up short last night -- the fight to make New Mexico better isn't over yet. It's just beginning.
The most important thing a candidate can tell you is why they are running for office. Once you know that -- you know exactly what they'll be fighting for when they are elected.
For me, it's simple: I ran to make New Mexico better for our children.
I wanted your children, and my twins, Cash and Collins, to be able to call New Mexico home. To raise a family here, grow a business here, and always feel safe here.
So, nine months ago I decided to throw my hat in the ring to try to give the state we love and call home a brighter future.
This campaign has blessed me with the opportunity to travel to every corner and across every county of our district. I have gotten to know some incredible New Mexicans and wouldn't trade the experience for the world.
I want to thank God for making this extraordinary experience possible. I want to thank my amazing husband, Chance, and my entire family for their support. This campaign has not been easy on them, but they stood by my side through every challenge we faced along the way. They are amazing.
Thank you to our hard-working volunteers and all of the voters in the 2nd District who put their trust in me. Through thick and thin, you stuck with me and fought for me. You welcomed me into your homes and your communities with open arms, and as a first-time candidate that meant the absolute world to me and my family. Thank you.
Last but not least, I want to congratulate Chris Mathys on running a strong campaign, and Yvette Herrell on her victory. This was a hard-fought Primary Election - no doubt about it, but our real fight has always been defeating Xochitl Torres Small, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the Democrats who meddled in our Republican primary.
Now it's time for Republicans to come together, finish the fight, and turn New Mexico red for President Trump. We're sending a campaign contribution to Yvette Herrell and I would encourage everyone else who has the means to do the same.
The future of our children and the next generation depends on sending a conservative who shares our values to Congress. So let's go finish the fight.
Thank you all again for your support. God bless.
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Hi Peter \- I wanted to reach out and thank you for your support throughout this campaign. Even though we came up short last night -- the fight to make New Mexico better isn't over yet. It's just beginning. The most important thing a candidate can tell you is why they are running for office. Once you know that -- you know exactly what they'll be fighting for when they are elected. For me, it's simple: I ran to make New Mexico better for our children. I wanted your children, and my twins, Cash and Collins, to be able to call New Mexico home. To raise a family here, grow a business here, and always feel safe here. So, nine months ago I decided to throw my hat in the ring to try to give the state we love and call home a brighter future. This campaign has blessed me with the opportunity to travel to every corner and across every county of our district. I have gotten to know some incredible New Mexicans and wouldn't trade the experience for the world. I want to thank God for making this extraordinary experience possible. I want to thank my amazing husband, Chance, and my entire family for their support. This campaign has not been easy on them, but they stood by my side through every challenge we faced along the way. They are amazing. Thank you to our hard-working volunteers and all of the voters in the 2nd District who put their trust in me. Through thick and thin, you stuck with me and fought for me. You welcomed me into your homes and your communities with open arms, and as a first-time candidate that meant the absolute world to me and my family. Thank you. Last but not least, I want to congratulate Chris Mathys on running a strong campaign, and Yvette Herrell on her victory. This was a hard-fought Primary Election - no doubt about it, but our real fight has always been defeating Xochitl Torres Small, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the Democrats who meddled in our Republican primary. Now it's time for Republicans to come together, finish the fight, and turn New Mexico red for President Trump. We're sending a campaign contribution to Yvette Herrell and I would encourage everyone else who has the means to do the same. The future of our children and the next generation depends on sending a conservative who shares our values to Congress. So let's go finish the fight. Thank you all again for your support. God bless. | | == == == | | | PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC. | | Claire Chase for Congress | PO Box 8010, Roswell, NM 88202 | | Sent by mailto:claire@clairechase.org

Amanda Makki joins Fox and Friends

------------------------------------------------------------
Campaign Overview:
Amanda Makki has run an incredible campaign, with over 25 national, state and local endorsements and having raised over $740,000 with a burn rate of just 18 percent!

Amanda is also one of only 27 candidates in The United States to be named a Young Guns “Contender” and the only candidate in FL-13 to earn this distinction.

Amanda has over two dozen endorsements of conservative leaders at the national, state and local level, including some of President Trump’s closest allies in Congress.
------------------------------------------------------------
Kevin McCarthy Endorsement
Steve Scalise Endorsement
Michael Waltz Endorsement Elise Stefanik Endorsement Robert O'Neill Endorsement
------------------------------------------------------------

https://secure.winred.com/amanda-makki-for-congress/donate?sc=F&F&amount=25

** Meet Amanda:
------------------------------------------------------------

Amanda Makki and her family escaped an oppressive religious regime persecuting Christians and Jews, and came to The United States legally in 1979. As a healthcare expert, and someone who managed a small business, Amanda is uniquely qualified for the challenges our nation is facing today with COVID-19 and the need to reboot our economy. Amanda worked in the Pentagon just weeks after 9/11 and served her country at the Department of the Army. Thereafter, Amanda advised Members of Congress on healthcare and veterans issues and in her last job, became a Partner at one of the largest law firms in the world before the age of 40.

Amanda has lived in Pinellas County since 2015 is an avid biker, golfer, and fisherman. She is devout in her Christian faith, and worships at Starkey Road Baptist Church.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Lying About Donald Trump is Now Completely Out of Control
body:
“Anti-trump liberals (i.e., Democrats and the media) just have to find something—anything—wrong with the president, even if it means making it up.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb87a2b682&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Lying About Donald Trump is Now Completely Out of Control**

“Anti-Trump liberals (i.e., Democrats and the media) just have to find something—anything—wrong with the president, even if it means making it up,” Eddie Scarry writes in the _New York Post_.

Examples range from sharing a misleading photograph to flat-out ignoring the President’s own words to attack things he never said in the first place.

“It never ends, but these aren’t mistakes. This is how the national media are intended to operate in the Trump era. If they can’t find something wrong with him, they make it up.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fbf4cf4b9e&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [“Media Falsely Claimed Violent Riots Were Peaceful and That Tear Gas Was Used Against Rioters”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b3b8112e36&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “In St. Louis, four officers were shot but didn’t sustain life-threatening injuries. Yet, for one retired captain, David Dorn, that was not the case. He was murdered in cold blood trying to protect a local pawn shop . . . It’s an absolute disgrace. And what’s more, is that the liberal media probably won’t cover this story,” Matt Vespa writes in [_Townhall_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82e8a7dc9a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Certain cities are under siege in America. “What all these cities have in common is that they are led by Democrats who seem to have bought into the belief that the police are a bigger problem than rampant disorder . . . They offer pro forma disapproval of law breakers but refuse to act to stop them,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33f88f7683&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| As rioters terrorize our cities, they end up sharing “much in common with the bad cops they claim to despise,” Indiana Attorney General Curtis Hill writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e2e6ea80b3&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d1795f4ec9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2fe41a4bc1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=80d9fab68c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Proud of all of you
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/proud-of-all-of-you?e=90fad69796)
---
| |
---
| |
# _**We came up short, ****but we didn't lose.**_
Since my cancer diagnosis — the last two weeks have been quite the rollercoaster.

Campaigns are emotional enough without cancer.

We could have quit as soon as we received the bad news on my health.

But we didn’t.

And when I say “we” I mean you and our entire team.

You all stood with me until the final fight.

I will never forget that. And neither will my family.

I’m very proud of what you all helped us accomplish.

In the final 10 days of the race we:
✅Raised nearly $50k for our GOTV effort.
✅Made over 600,000 voter contacts.
✅Forced a formerly pro-abortion candidate to publicly commit to protecting the unborn when their heartbeat is detected.

The odds were always stacked against us. Had we won, it would have been the first time a former member of Congress moved to a new state and won since 1970!

We fought hard and gave a great fight.

Please don’t be a stranger. We are so grateful for all the support we received over the last year.

God bless you all and God bless America!

\- Bobby Schilling
---

God bless you all and God bless America! \- Bobby Schilling | "Donate Now ›" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Bobby for Iowa, All rights reserved.

subject: fwd: We ended carotid restraint in San Diego. Now, let’s end it nationally.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|

Friend -- We wanted to bump this message from Georgette about San Diego's ban on the use of carotid restraint (chokeholds) by the police force.

Thousands of activists in San Diego and beyond have signed our petition calling for a nationwide ban on carotid restraint. There's still time to take action on this issue:

**[Please sign our petition telling Congress to pass a nationwide ban on carotid restraint>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17736747/204617412/-738092359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDY3YzUzNy1kN2E1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqXGBmlY94pdVhEhoXolSrU_JuSRfUjiVzEpTlgSOZo=&emci=485c28c7-19a5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=7067c537-d7a5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)**

— Team Gómez

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
**From: Georgette Gómez**
Date: Mon, Jun 1, 2020 at 8:36 PM
Subject: We ended carotid restraint in San Diego. Now, let’s end it nationally.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17736748/204617413/1136511447?refcode=em-01092020-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDY3YzUzNy1kN2E1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqXGBmlY94pdVhEhoXolSrU_JuSRfUjiVzEpTlgSOZo=)

Friend --

Earlier today we saw a President continue to incite, demonize and divide. In San Diego, we’re going in the other direction – united, focused on fighting for justice and determined to keep the peace.

I’m proud to announce that San Diego is one of the first cities in America to take direct action to ensure that the tactics that led to George Floyd’s tragic death are never used here.

**Today, the San Diego Police Department is ending use of the carotid restraint – a chokehold technique many of us have worked for years to ban.**

This is an important step forward for police reform, building trust between communities and law enforcement and it’s long past time.

We’re putting the passions of the protests towards real progress for racial justice, fair policing and upholding the dignity of every San Diegan.

**[We need to take the next step. Please sign my petition calling on Congress to implement a nationwide ban on carotid restraint.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17736749/204617414/-609082886?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDY3YzUzNy1kN2E1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqXGBmlY94pdVhEhoXolSrU_JuSRfUjiVzEpTlgSOZo=&emci=485c28c7-19a5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=7067c537-d7a5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)**

Chokeholds incite at a time when we need to de-escalate. A knee on the neck ended the life out of George Floyd. And in San Diego, we are determined to ensure that never happens here.

To the peaceful protesters: I know you’re angry – and I’m angry too. I want you to know that we hear your voices and we are taking action. And there’s more reform to come.

And to the San Diego Police: We need you to de escalate, not escalate, in these highly charged moments. And I want to thank our Chief of Police David Nisleit for helping implement this important reform.

San Diego – please stay safe tonight. Please stay united tonight. And please know that our work for justice, dignity and respect for all continues.

From the bottom of my heart,

_Georgette Gómez_

**Georgette Gómez helped implement a ban on the use of carotid restraint by Police in San Diego, but we need to take the next step. Sign our petition calling on Congress to pass a nationwide ban on carotid restraint NOW.**
[Sign The Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17736750/204617415/-609082886?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDY3YzUzNy1kN2E1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqXGBmlY94pdVhEhoXolSrU_JuSRfUjiVzEpTlgSOZo=&emci=485c28c7-19a5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=7067c537-d7a5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)

---
Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
---
Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. _**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17736751/204617416/1136511447?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDY3YzUzNy1kN2E1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqXGBmlY94pdVhEhoXolSrU_JuSRfUjiVzEpTlgSOZo=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/485c28c7-19a5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb/7067c537-d7a5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDY3YzUzNy1kN2E1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqXGBmlY94pdVhEhoXolSrU_JuSRfUjiVzEpTlgSOZo=&id=110960909).

subject: Thank You!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friends, Thank you, thank you, thank you! I am honored to be entrusted to represent you, the Republican party, and our Montana values as the Republican nominee for State Auditor. Since day one of this campaign, I have promised transparency in the Auditor's office, consumer protection, removing meaningless regulations, driving the costs of health insurance and subscription drugs down, and holding bad actors accountable. I have also promised to be a true steward to our state trust lands on the land board- protecting what we hold dear, supporting the backbone of our economy, and funding education. Yesterday this vision for Montana triumphed. The primary is over, but today we begin our campaign to keep a proven Conservative in the Auditor's office. I am humbled. Humbled by our supporters, humbled by the hard work of my team, humbled by those who volunteered their time for the cause, and eager to roll up my sleeves and start the meaningful work that will help and protect all Montanans.. Thank you and may God Bless you, -Troy
---
|
---
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=e2fd50a67d&e=a212bb87cc "DONATE NOW")

| Dear Friend,

We did it! We won the primary! The votes are still being counted, but we currently have 77% of the vote.

We couldn't be more proud of the efforts and dedication demonstrated by you, our team of grassroots volunteers and community supporters, and staff who shifted gears and put so much into new ways of voter outreach when COVID-19 struck, and all the world was changed. Because of your efforts, you have helped position us to defeat Jackie Walorski in November. With your help, we're going to take back Indiana’s 2nd Congressional District, and restore Dignity and Justice for All.

The work is only just beginning. As Richard Painter–George W. Bush's ethics lawyer–pointed out in his tweet above this morning, we need to send courageous leaders like Pat Hackett to Washington to call out the danger of the Trump/Barr alliance and to recommit as a nation to the rule of law.
[**Please, invest in our campaign to take back IN-02 and restore Dignity and Justice for All in Washington.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ad1a39512f&e=5886ca081d)

The stakes in November could not be higher, and the world is watching. Thank you, all, for your vote and for your investment in defeating Jackie Walorski.

\-- Team Hackett

Earlier today, my finance director, Eliza, sent around a note to all of our supporters with an update on our progress towards tonight's fundraising deadline. And in the hours since, we've seen a massive surge in donations that have brought us just shy of where we need to be. **[But we didn't come all this way to fall short now -- will you rush in a contribution before midnight to help get us across the finish line?](https://act.myngp.com/el/hDdV3hfk_6xGgFah6DLy4LH3MtlSCaGKwnq24QM0LFk=/mU5UWBHBxWkQV8GYEb-hukltu5RN5b4F14UfW_wdPL0=)**

If everyone reading this email contributed whatever amount they could, whether that's $500 or $1, we'd surge right past our goal. name: Doug Greven, Co-Founder of Voter Protection Project
subject: Black Lives Matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0455/72412298/4c5e1722/61056d5d/5623374/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200603_BLM_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200603_BLM_U1_X1")

| | Peter-- There is a lot of hurt in America right now. **Peter--** **There is a lot of hurt in America right now.** More black lives have been taken from us at the hands of law enforcement and without consequence. Nationwide, over 11,000 people have been arrested since last Monday. While mass protests continue and the only ask is for equality and justice --_these asks have been met with police violence, tear gas, and shots fired._ **At the Voter Protection Project we find these actions completely unacceptable and inexcusable -- and we stand ready to fight alongside this movement and to be a part of the solution.** **Black Lives Matter.** To our core the Voter Protection Project is committed to making sure these voices are heard in the streets and at the ballot box. We'll confront systemic racism and discrimination in our country every way we can -- that's our promise. **Too many protesters have been wrongly arrested -- and we must set these protesters free. We need your help:[please consider making a donation split between bail funds across the country.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0455/72412298/4c5e1722/61056d5c/5623374/VEsE/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bailfundscovid?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+please+consider+making+a+donation+split+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200603_BLM_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200603_BLM_U1_X1")** | | | [Donate to Bail Funds](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0455/72412298/4c5e1722/61056d5f/5623374/VEsF/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bailfundscovid?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Donate+to+Bail+Funds&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200603_BLM_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200603_BLM_U1_X1")
---
In solidarity,
\-- Doug Greven, Co-Founder of Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0455/72412298/4c5e1722/61056d5e/5623374/VEsC/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200603_BLM_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200603_BLM_U1_X1")

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: "Complete and total endorsement"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
****
Friend, Did you see the news yesterday? **Our President, Donald Trump, gave me his complete and total endorsement for the primary election upcoming on June 23rd.** I am honored to have the support of our President for the upcoming special election and now primary election, and will work tirelessly with him to get our country and this district back on track. In his endorsement of me the President said, _**" Chris Jacobs will be a tremendous Congressman who will always fight for New York. He is Strong on the Border, our Military and Vets, and the Second Amendment. Chris has my Complete and Total Endorsement! Vote for Chris on June 23!"**_ **__** **I 'm proud to be the only candidate to carry his endorsement for this district.** Western New York needs a conservative leader in Congress to fight for our values, and our President needs an ally who will help him fight for all Americans as we rebuild our nation. [With our last fundraising deadline prior to the June 23rd election being tonight at midnight, I wanted to know if the President and I could count on you to help us finish with a strong report?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/y70QXzscmkormfYCA6VyCA/LqX7SFse892p7632L7Ff44OVvg) Our President has put his trust in me and knows I am the leader he needs in Washington with him working to get tough on China, secure our borders, and build our economy. I look forward to working everyday to help him accomplish his America First Agenda. **The President and I need your support on June 23rd** to ensure that conservative leadership is sent to Congress to represent Western New York. [By chipping in just a few dollars today you can help ensure we are succesful on Election Day.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/y70QXzscmkormfYCA6VyCA/LqX7SFse892p7632L7Ff44OVvg) Thank you for your continued support and I hope you are staying safe during this time. Best,
Chris Jacobs

body:
Did you see this!!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/aa583abd6a11/amanda-makki-builds-momentum-against-charlie-crist-watch-her-interview-on-fox-and-friends-1493285?e=bbeef49760)
https://video.foxnews.com/v/6158802545001

------------------------------------------------------------
Campaign Overview:
Amanda Makki has run an incredible campaign, with over 25 national, state and local endorsements and having raised over $740,000 with a burn rate of just 18 percent!

Amanda is also one of only 27 candidates in The United States to be named a Young Guns “Contender” and the only candidate in FL-13 to earn this distinction.

Amanda has over two dozen endorsements of conservative leaders at the national, state and local level, including some of President Trump’s closest allies in Congress.
------------------------------------------------------------
Kevin McCarthy Endorsement
Steve Scalise Endorsement
Elise Stefanik Endorsement Robert O'Neill Endorsement
------------------------------------------------------------

https://secure.winred.com/amanda-makki-for-congress/donate?sc=F&F&amount=25

** Meet Amanda:
------------------------------------------------------------

Amanda Makki and her family escaped an oppressive religious regime persecuting Christians and Jews, and came to The United States legally in 1979. As a healthcare expert, and someone who managed a small business, Amanda is uniquely qualified for the challenges our nation is facing today with COVID-19 and the need to reboot our economy. Amanda worked in the Pentagon just weeks after 9/11 and served her country at the Department of the Army. Thereafter, Amanda advised Members of Congress on healthcare and veterans issues and in her last job, became a Partner at one of the largest law firms in the world before the age of 40.

Amanda has lived in Pinellas County since 2015 and is an avid biker, golfer, and fisherman. She is devout in her Christian faith, and worships at Starkey Road Baptist Church.

Meet Amanda Meet Amanda

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17737775/204646559/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yzg5MDQyMS1lM2E1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tApxqBwjUgoVjuFmDIlhgMXcXQ6_YDJp1IPIHL41Ai0=&emci=e2f598a6-d9a5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=6c890421-e3a5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

We want to ensure that the voices of people in our district are front-and-center in our campaign, because our campaign is about the people of TX-22 -- _not_ media narratives or the issues that corporate donors want us to champion.

**If you have a moment, please give a response to our one-click poll below; your feedback helps our campaign meet the changing needs of our district.**

Thank you,

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hh1BhF-xnl_EvhvDzeov3ORNn68PPuxo6V8FD2XuxFP_o51nFxVFE-2P7uJDvLiVNhG5dsOOoU_oxsn3lHCvFwldW5PeMSquKLkb6mxwuC245wbJikQH3enSplA6pC-Yuvy4Jq4Bq_nqwRVYnEnb4OK-PJPM_PQKPtbMyomcRvZSs1OaMn8t9uMMscPmonh5&c=4FLTF37XOeX8pRlwyN0PhE9v7UcYJFDA-YtEqykQZ7e91pRLLsF3Gg==&ch=60Nlgb36PY4DL3QHByNb-sF_pi9QuQQk182H87l9X8iZzT__YWNvUA==)

| Patriot,
This is unbelievable. The NAACP has recently called out Marcus Chambers, our outstanding School Superintendent here in Okaloosa County.
His crime? Supporting Donald Trump for President.
The truth is, the NAACP hates when outstanding black leaders have the audacity to voice their own political opinions. Now, they are trying to take down Marcus, despite his stellar record as Okaloosa County School Superintendent.
We cannot let the NAACP smear Marcus just because he has the audacity to support President Trump, which is why I'm asking you to [CHIP IN](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hh1BhF-xnl_EvhvDzeov3ORNn68PPuxo6V8FD2XuxFP_o51nFxVFE-2P7uJDvLiVNhG5dsOOoU_oxsn3lHCvFwldW5PeMSquKLkb6mxwuC245wbJikQH3enSplA6pC-Yuvy4Jq4Bq_nqwRVYnEnb4OK-PJPM_PQKPtbMyomcRvZSs1OaMn8t9uMMscPmonh5&c=4FLTF37XOeX8pRlwyN0PhE9v7UcYJFDA-YtEqykQZ7e91pRLLsF3Gg==&ch=60Nlgb36PY4DL3QHByNb-sF_pi9QuQQk182H87l9X8iZzT__YWNvUA==) to Marcus' campaign for Superintendent.
Not only does Marcus have the courage to take on the NAACP and the Democrat Party, but he also wants to continue his strong record of school choice and teaching American values in our schools.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Patriot, This is unbelievable. The NAACP has recently called out Marcus Chambers, our outstanding School Superintendent here in Okaloosa County. His crime? Supporting Donald Trump for President. The truth is, the NAACP hates when outstanding black leaders have the audacity to voice their own political opinions. Now, they are trying to take down Marcus, despite his stellar record as Okaloosa County School Superintendent. We cannot let the NAACP smear Marcus just because he has the audacity to support President Trump, which is why I'm asking you to == to Marcus' campaign for Superintendent. Not only does Marcus have the courage to take on the NAACP and the Democrat Party, but he also wants to continue his strong record of school choice and teaching American values in our schools. | | | == | == | Marcus Chambers is both a friend and an amazing leader in our community. He has done a great job as our school superintendent, and I support him 100%. Since Marcus is coming under fire for supporting the President, I'm asking that you give to his campaign. ** Tune in tonight at 6p for my exclusive with President Trump
------------------------------------------------------------
Tonight at 6p on my show "Spicer & Company (www.seanspicer.com/spicer-co/) " on Newsmax I sit down with President Trump. Don't miss it, we cover the murder of George Floyd, the protests and riots, and how we can heal the nation.

I also asked President Trump about sanctions on China, his most recent Executive Order on Section 230 dealing with social media platforms, and the latest on social distancing and coronavirus. We talked about the media treatment of First Lady Melania Trump and her influence on him, as well as what he thinks his father would think of him becoming president.

Find your Newsmax channel here (http://www.seanspicer.com/spicer-co/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=f2ca026256-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_03_04_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-f2ca026256-68212193) . After the interview airs it will be on my YouTube channel, subscribe here (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=f2ca026256-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_03_04_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-f2ca026256-68212193) now.

Thanks,

Sean

name: =?utf-8?Q?Coleman=20for=20Justice?=
subject: Coleman Announces Major Endorsements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Re-Elect Josiah Coleman
body:
As you can see from this story on recent endorsements, our campaign to re-elect Justice Josiah Coleman is going strong. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6779ee18b9f0/coleman-announces-major-endorsements?e=933d5e1643)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Friends,

As you can see from [this story ](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=891539a12d&e=933d5e1643)on recent endorsements, our campaign to re-elect Justice Josiah Coleman is going strong.

It's hard to believe our next fundraising deadline -- June 10th -- is fast approaching. We need your help now to raise funds for printing yard signs and bumper stickers, paying for advertising, and gearing up for a competitive election this fall.

Business and Industry Political Education Committee (BIPEC) President & CEO Derek Easley said it best: “It is important for Mississippi to keep a fair and balanced judiciary. Free enterprise and entrepreneurship require an impartial, fair, and rule-of-law judiciary – the idea and practice of ‘legislating from the bench’ undermines the foundation of our free-market economy, thus impacting employers and employees. That is why Judge Coleman is recommended by BIPEC as best for adhering to the impartiality and fairness of Mississippi’s highest court.”
[**< <<Donate $250 to buy radio ads>>>**](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=ae26086a75&e=933d5e1643)

[**< <<Donate $100 to buy digital ads>>>**](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=d79b38f6bd&e=933d5e1643)

[**< <<Donate $50 to buy 10 yard signs>>>**](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=6f886c7ff4&e=933d5e1643)

[**< <<Donate $35 to buy 100 bumper stickers>>>**](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=af311ae873&e=933d5e1643)

>From _[Y'all Politics:](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=c58ae172c6&e=933d5e1643)_

Justice Josiah Coleman today announced endorsements from eight major organizations, representing thousands of employers and workers in agriculture, healthcare, real estate, and trucking, among other industries.

The endorsements include:

**BankPlus PAC
Business and Industry Political Education Committee (BIPEC)
Ergon PAC
Mississippi Automobile Dealers Association
(MADA AutoPAC)
Mississippi Physicians PAC
Mississippi Poultry Association PAC (MPA-PAC)
Mississippi Realtors PAC
Mississippi Trucking Association PAC (Truck-PAC)**

“The drivers of employment and economic growth in Mississippi stand behind Josiah Coleman,” said Lex Taylor, campaign chairman. “We are confident in Josiah Coleman’s integrity, impartiality, and ethical leadership. We are grateful for the support and we will continue working hard to once again earn the trust of Mississippi voters in November.”

###

The endorsements include: BankPlus PAC Business and Industry Political Education Committee (BIPEC) Ergon PAC Mississippi Automobile Dealers Association (MADA AutoPAC) Mississippi Physicians PAC Mississippi Poultry Association PAC (MPA-PAC) Mississippi Realtors PAC Mississippi Trucking Association PAC (Truck-PAC) “The drivers of employment and economic growth in Mississippi stand behind Josiah Coleman,” said Lex Taylor, campaign chairman. “We are confident in Josiah Coleman’s integrity, impartiality, and ethical leadership. We are grateful for the support and we will continue working hard to once again earn the trust of Mississippi voters in November.” | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Committee to Re-Elect Josiah Coleman, All rights reserved. Paid for by the Committee to Re-Elect Josiah Coleman Our mailing address is: Committee to Re-Elect Josiah ColemanPO Box 2264Oxford, MS 38655-7264 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Dr. Woody Myers
subject: It's official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Myers for Governor
body:
Dr. Woody Myers is running to be Governor of Indiana because he knows our state needs new leadership where people are first - not politics. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b41267cb-54a4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd/85419466-e8a5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQxOTQ2Ni1lOGE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DXI73xvkCKHS9TCIqj5Mg5rhwe96QAW-qeT9rMPB-4U=&id=123192508 .

Peter,

It’s official. I am Indiana’s Democratic nominee for Governor.

And I couldn’t have done it without you.

Thank you for joining me in this historic campaign. We are living and campaigning through one of the worst public health and economic crises in our history, during a time of social unrest. And in yesterday’s primary, you helped get me that much closer to being the first African American governor in Indiana’s history.

I’m running for Governor of Indiana because I owe a debt to those who worked, sacrificed, and inspired me to use my education as a force for good and in service to all, in a state that has given me so much, the state I love, my home state of Indiana.

I will change Indiana, and our nation, for the better. I will use science and public health principles to make good decisions related to COVID-19, to rectify health disparities, to clean-up our environment, and to tear down barriers to long and healthy lives for all, irrespective of race, religion, gender, or sexual orientation. I will challenge Indiana to confront its past so we can work together for a much better future.

As Governor, I’ll use my life experiences as a third-generation Hoosier, physician, former Indiana Health Commissioner, small business owner, father, and grandfather to make Indiana better than we’ve been. And to make us everything we can be.

The road ahead will be difficult. It will take a lot of work to take down the Pence-Holcomb dynasty, but it’s worth it to fight for policies that help working families, especially now.

Let’s build the future we deserve... together.

I need you with me. Today, can you pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can to make sure we have the resources we need to win in November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/myers-default?refcode=20200603_e_1__fl&amount=25]

I know what Hoosiers are made of. Out on the campaign trail, I’ve seen your compassion. I’ve felt your commitment. I’ve witnessed your determination to fight for a better life... an economy that works for you, for your families, for your neighbors and friends. A community that supports the downtrodden, those left behind, and those who need to know that they are not alone.

So let’s get to work; we can’t afford to wait.

Dr. Woody Myers, (Official) Democratic Nominee for Governor of Indiana

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/myers-default?refcode=20200603_e_1__fl&amount=25]

Paid for by Myers for Governor
PO Box 1903
Indianapolis, IN 46206
United States
This message was sent to your email address

Dr. Woody Myers is running to be Governor of Indiana because he knows our state needs new leadership where people are first - not politics. As Governor, Woody will use his background in business and in medicine to guarantee all Hoosiers can access high-quality health care at an affordable cost, bring more good-paying jobs that can’t be shipped overseas to Indiana and provide every Hoosier child with a world-class public education.

Woody is running a grassroots campaign, which means our success is fueled by supporters like you. Please consider making a contribution to Myers for Governor today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/myers-default?refcode=footer-textlink]

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b41267cb-54a4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd/85419466-e8a5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQxOTQ2Ni1lOGE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DXI73xvkCKHS9TCIqj5Mg5rhwe96QAW-qeT9rMPB-4U=&id=123192508 .

clean_body: | | | | | | Friends, Check out my new TV ad! I'm setting the record straight on my staunchly conservative record and fighting back against the lies and offensive attacks from my opponent and the Swamp special interest groups that are supporting him. | Please WATCH and SHARE! | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | Rich McCormick and his special interest supporters from the Swamp have spent over a million dollars peddling the lie that one of the most conservative legislators in Georgia, me, is a liberal. But that’s politics. You can easily research and see that I authored one of the strongest pro-life laws in the nation, that I helped deliver the biggest tax cut in Georgia history and that I’m the only candidate endorsed by the NRA. | Will you stand with me? | Thank you for your support! -Renee | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Unterman for Congress, All rights reserved.

Francis has earned the support of dozens of Democrats from every corner of our party. He's got the grit it'll take to win -- and it's even more clear the GOP knows it, too.

clean_body: Friends, If you didn’t already see this, I wanted to make sure you did. I could not be more grateful to President Trump for his total and complete endorsement. It means the world to me and my campaign to know we’re doing right by the leader of our country, especially during such a divisive time in our history. President Trump's endorsement gives us a leg up against our opponents today, but the fight is far from over. Friend, you know I’ll stand up for the people of Indiana, work hard for small business owners and veterans, and support the second amendment. But I can’t do any of it without your support. Standing with me means standing with President Trump, and standing with President Trump means standing with what makes America great. Thank you, Jim Banks PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: RIGHT NOW: Firearm Carry and Sales Banned!
body:
West Palm Beach, Florida, which is located in my Congressional District, FL-21, where I’m running for US Congress has declared a State of Emergency . . . and with that, comes an AUTOMATIC ban on the sale or display of firearms or ammunition and the ban of carrying firearms in public!
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378403-891097-5026571-b7e99055cf-f9c76399bf)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378403-891097-5026570-f5a636201f-f9c76399bf) West Palm Beach, Florida, which is located in my Congressional District, FL-21, where I’m running for US Congress has declared a State of Emergency . . . and with that, comes an AUTOMATIC ban on the sale or display of firearms or ammunition **and the ban of carrying firearms in public!**

Even lawful gun owners who went through the process of obtaining a Concealed Carry Permit are forbidden from protecting themselves in public while riots and looting continue!

At a time when citizens are in dire need of personal protection, **the Democrat-led local just government stripped those rights**.

And it’s just not in my area, counties and cities around Florida are under a State of Emergency.

**And Florida isn’t alone . . .**

**Washington State, Texas, Georgia, Louisiana and others have similar laws on the books that either ban possession or sale of firearms and ammunition during a State of Emergency.**

These insane steps to circumvent the Constitution have to stop . . . and it needs to be done on the federal level!

Do you think my Democrat opponent, Rep. Lois Frankel, or ANY Democrat will take steps to allow Americans to protect themselves and their families as their cities are burned and looted?

Not a chance!

Like we saw in New Orleans during Hurricane Katrina, where citizens had their firearms seized during the emergency, **Democrats will rush in to take your guns during an emergency**.

Help me put a stop to these unconstitutional acts by sending me to Washington. [**Donate right now and help me bring commonsense legislation to Congress!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378403-891097-5026570-f5a636201f-f9c76399bf)

With Democrat control of the House, we’ll need as many Republicans to win in 2020 as possible. You know my principles, you know I can win, and [**I’m asking for your support right now**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378403-891097-5026570-f5a636201f-f9c76399bf).

Thank you for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Please check your local and state legislation to see if you’ll be disarmed during an emergency. **Know the law so you can challenge and change the law.** Thanks again and [**please don’t forget to donate today**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378403-891097-5026570-f5a636201f-f9c76399bf).

body:
I am honored that the amazing people of Pennsylvania’s First Congressional District have once again placed their trust and faith in me and our campaig [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=5b17a606b6aa4901be9467e20907da8a&_e=c5cJi2IawhbmTY30QLsZgHym8P3QkO1zljaFodS5ddffZguEEsbqdXUcrJRi5Qow4u3y5h7NyA_WQzhs2xTJcdoaCj8WVeZRUXUluBVupYRse8Kk78Cz-z4bIGcgAMn9Vdv0YgHYknST8rd6hozDv__PB4i12wgbOx4CPz8S2fm-iRxQNy5OJtvyu9dLjz2CrAvEm9svvXuip2nEKYc8CwOdBG-5qnV3D4vMddwHmxQ_Ado5xeJ_dgsbnSNbPfrdDejq_vAdQN3W1pe5GEvnq7mB3QfxGRC3dNM7A44-xbhGljiCPpUjoImXlxmIUH1PKc03WMQwLIVHiTsyCzarWpuMhLdxBkONOQMQz032Qwo%3D) Friend, I am honored that the amazing people of Pennsylvania’s First Congressional District have once again placed their trust and faith in me and our campaign. Our campaign is a team effort, and I once again thank our amazing and hardworking volunteers who give their time, talents and energy to bring our community together. Now, as we look forward toward the future, it is imperative that we come together as one community to save our nation from the divisive politics that is tearing our country apart. I am and will continue to be dedicated to serving the people of the First District, and I look forward to continuing our campaign by bringing our community together, standing together in unity and solidarity. [**Stand with me**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=5b17a606b6aa4901be9467e20907da8a&_e=c5cJi2IawhbmTY30QLsZgHym8P3QkO1zljaFodS5ddffZguEEsbqdXUcrJRi5Qow4u3y5h7NyA_WQzhs2xTJcdoaCj8WVeZRUXUluBVupYRse8Kk78Cz-z4bIGcgAMn9Vdv0YgHYknST8rd6hozDv2WijtXxzjZ1QcJR-DuaCEgGFJlIXMUpV7M-TEDrk_o9e1R0TNwVGdEST3qzyIcJ6Dz9PavQnalp4QYvaMs0QjGynRx7ZifmXF7qF65LEaEpxQUMyI2VGNZvQyy7ALZETa5l6aT5dI9QgWzRWt65IYYfj9r6eKC5P8uRI2kEDwFDvQAI52-tsCsklrxdrkIkM2Zz-5TlS-TqQ_dThZuguWU%3D) Brian Fitzpatrick

name: Pragya Nandini
subject: (no subject)
body:
Adem's NY1 debate just finished airing, and I'm so fired up that I had to email you immediately, Peter.

New York City just saw why this campaign matters. Adem is ready to fight for meaningful police reforms; Rep. Clarke thinks holding a press conference to decry a few "bad apples" in the NYPD is taking action. Adem believes it's time for the richest among us to pay their fair share; Rep. Clarke believes that we should preserve the status quo and let working families pay the tab. In short, Adem has bold ideas; Rep. Clarke only has old ideas.

I believe Brooklyn deserves more -- and I know you do too.

There are still a few hours until our midnight deadline. Chip in right now to show the world that you're with Adem: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abjunedeadline

Let's win this,
Pragya

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We have much more to do to root out systemic racial inequality
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Friend,

We have much more to do to root out systemic racial inequality

In Washington state and across the country, people are expressing pain and anger from generations of systemic racism.

The murders of George Floyd in Minnesota, Ahmaud Arbery in Georgia, and countless others are horrific. Their lives mattered. Black lives matter.

I applaud every Washingtonian and American standing for justice and equality. Over the past few days, we've seen hundreds of thousands of people peaceably exercise their First Amendment right, challenging all of us to lift our sights and to reduce inequity in our society. We cannot and will not allow that important message to be obscured by the destructive actions of a few.

Earlier this week, President Trump had law enforcement use tear gas on peaceful protestors so he could have a photo op, and he also threatened to deploy military action. He called for violent actions against Americans expressing their First Amendment right to protest.

He has repeatedly proven he is incapable of governing. He has shown nothing but false bravado throughout the chaos that has accompanied his time in office. Our country is defined by our collective character and democratic ideals, not by reactionary calls for division and not by threatening Americans with their own military.

We have much more to do to root out systemic inequality in our society. While we continue to prevent and confront the deaths of Black people by law enforcement, we must also address inequities for Black Americans in education, in healthcare, in housing, and in the reaction to COVID-19.

I hope in the days to come we all think of ways to do that. I'm committed -- I hope you are, too.

One of the ways to show that commitment is supporting the NAACP Legal Defense Fund. Every donation funds the fight toward winning landmark legal battles, protecting Black voters across the nation, and advancing the cause of racial justice, equality, and an inclusive society.

If you can, make a donation to support the NAACP Legal Defense Fund right now -- in fact, make it monthly.
https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8593?t=1002&akid=8061%2E868730%2EQgM2FG

It's dependent on those of us who can step up to step up in a big way right now. To make a real difference, we have to do more than talk -- we have to act. Thanks for joining me to do that.

Very truly yours,

Jay

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe: http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=8061%2E868730%2EQgM2FG

Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. All content (c) 2020 JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D), All Rights Reserved

Privacy Policy: http://act.jayinslee.com/go/122?t=1001&akid=8061%2E868730%2EQgM2FG

PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
